title: Lương biến động mạnh
notes: Two months drop over 20% below reference (IVP-4). This raises a WARNING-severity finding (app/tools/consistency_rules.py only escalates to MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED on CRITICAL findings), so the case still reaches HUMAN_REVIEW with recommendation NEEDS_CLARIFICATION for the underwriter to judge — it does not hard-block the case.
